_real: REAL capture from the maintainer's live run (2026-06-22) via the M1 mod -> bridge pipe — NOT synthetic. Wand/spell/stat data is faithful as the mod emitted it; only run_id is relabeled from the placeholder 'run-10' (the known M1-T3 collision bug) so this real run is distinct from the toy run-10 unit fixtures and isn't mashed into their seen-this-run ledger. This is a fresh-run START (starter LIGHT_BULLET spammer + a GRENADE sidearm); richer built-up setups are archived live to /tmp/wand-captures and promoted to higher-numbered fixtures as the run develops. Purpose: ground the engine's scoring/generation on REAL wand complexity, not toy data.
